Gym: My Favorite Hobby

Why I enjoy the gym

Gym is one of my favorite hobbies because it helps me feel healthier and focused. I enjoy following a structured plan, tracking my progress, and improving over time. My training varies and depends on the activity I plan to partcipate in for example, running, hyrox or obstacle events. Even when motivation is low, to me showing up matters, because consistency builds results. I also love how training improves my mental health. Simply just doing a warm-up, lifting weights, or finishing with mobility work, I always leave feeling better. Going to train reminds me that even the smallest efforts repeated daily can create big change.

Things I focus on

  • Good form first (quality reps over heavy weight)
  • Progressive overload (small improvements each week)
  • Recovery (sleep, hydration, and rest days)
  • Mobility work to stay pain-free and move well
